zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Peyton於大約1395年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾時，她的父親John Peyton32歲，母親Joan Sutton28歲。她於1422年與John Bourgoyne在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾阿林頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1452年在英國坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Peyton于大约1395年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾时，她的父亲John Peyton32岁，母亲Joan Sutton28岁。她于1422年与John Bourgoyne在英国英格兰坎布利其爾阿林頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1452年在英国坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Peyton was born about 1395, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Peyton, was 32 and her mother, Joan Sutton, was 28. She married John Bourgoyne in 1422, in Arrington, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died about 1452, in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Peyton est née environ 1395, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Peyton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan Sutton, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Bourgoyne en 1422, à Arrington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1452, à Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Peyton um 1395 in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Peyton 32 und ihre Mutter Joan Sutton 28. Sie hat 1422 in Arrington, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom John Bourgoyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb um 1452 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Peyton è nata il circa 1395 nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Peyton, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Joan Sutton, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John Bourgoyne nel 1422, nel Arrington, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì circa 1452, nel Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Peytonが約1395年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Peytonは32歳，母Joan Suttonは28歳であった。1422年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアアリントンでJohn Bourgoyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1452年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアロング スタントンで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Peyton(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Peyton(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Sutton(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 아링턴에서 John Bourgoyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1452년 영국 캄브리지실르 론그 스탠턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Peyton nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Peyton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan Sutton, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John Bourgoyne em 1422, em Arrington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1452, em Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Peyton родилась около 1395 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Peyton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Sutton, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bourgoyne в 1422 г. в местности аррингтон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла около 1452 г. в местности лонг стантон, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Peyton nació aproximadamente 1395, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Peyton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan Sutton, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John Bourgoyne en 1422, en Arrington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1452, en Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
